location: Dropped by Lazuli Glintstone Sorcerers around Raya Lucaria Academy and Caria Manor; the most reliable farming spot is directly south of the Schoolhouse Classroom Site of Grace, just before the Red Wolf of Radagon boss fog.
tactics: From the Schoolhouse Classroom grace, head south to find Lazuli Sorcerers casting glintstone spells at range.
Drop rate is only around 2%, so expect to rest and re-farm several times — they're squishy and die fast.
Don't push too far south too early — you'll run into the Red Wolf of Radagon boss fog just beyond the farming spot.
lore: A sword set with a glintstone in its handguard, wielded as a scholar's tool by students of the Lazuli Conspectus studying Carian sorcery — carved from wood, it still functions as a makeshift staff.

builds.name: Int/Quality hybrid
builds.why: D Strength / E Dexterity / D Intelligence scaling plus an innate Glintstone Pebble skill make it a cheap, zero-investment sorcery option for a physically-focused Int build.
